productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Casual Brown Wallets
description: Crafted from soft leather, this brown wallet from Reid and Taylor is a fabulously stylish way to keep your money and cards safe and secure. With a smooth finish, this bi-fold wallet has an embossed branding on the upper and lots of inner storage making it perfect for everyday use.Dimensions: 11.5 cm X 9 cmLeather for flexibility and supplenessTwo main compartments with fabric inner liningMultiple partitions on the two front halves to stash away cards and coinsCareWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
